query: What is the capacity threshold that triggers the large generation interconnection process in NYISO according to the NYISO process manual 23 and guide UG21? Cite the relevant source report and section you got this from
final_answer:
Based on my research of NYISO's official documents, the capacity threshold that triggers the large generation interconnection process in NYISO is **20 MW**.

## Answer

**The capacity threshold is 20 MW.** Generating facilities exceeding 20 MW must use the Large Facility Interconnection Procedures (LFIP) under NYISO's OATT Attachment X.

## Supporting Evidence

### 1. NYISO OATT Attachment X - Standard Large Facility Interconnection Procedures
The tariff explicitly states the applicability threshold in its title and scope:

> **"30 Attachment X – Standard Large Facility Interconnection Procedures (Applicable to Generating Facilities that exceed 20 MWs and to Class Year Transmission Facilities)"**

Source: NYISO OATT Attachment X (Section 30), filed at FERC - [NYISO OATT Section 30 PDF](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/33257202/OATT%2520Section%252030%2520-%2520Full.pdf/ee515fbd-ef9e-0201-014e-beaa42a2c353)

### 2. NYISO Manual 23 (Transmission Expansion and Interconnection Manual) - Section 3.3.1.1
The manual explicitly defines which projects are subject to the LFIP:

> **"3.3.1.1 What projects are subject to the LFIP?"** - The LFIP applies to generating facilities that exceed **20 MW**.

Source: NYISO Manual 23, Version 2.0/2.1 (November 2012/October 2015 Draft) - [Manual 23 Redline PDF](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/1390384/agenda%208%20M-23_TEI%20Manual_Redline.pdf/c21edca4-dc5f-ab73-b6bd-065efb7c680e), Table of Contents showing Section 3.3.1.1

### 3. NYISO Manual 23 (2019 Version) - Table of Contents
The 2019 version of Manual 23 also shows the same structure:
- **Section 3.3: Large Facility Interconnection Procedures (LFIP)**
- **Section 3.3.1: Basic Information about the LFIP**
- **Section 3.3.1.1: What projects are subject to the LFIP?**

Source: NYISO Manual 23, Version 4.0 (Issued 08/02/2019) - [NY DPS Document](https://documents.dps.ny.gov/public/Common/ViewDoc.aspx?DocRefId=%7B80BDC927-CF2E-43E8-8A04-847D26B4E8E7%7D&DocTitle=Hearing+Exhibit+313+Manual+23+Transmission+Expansion+and+Interconnection+Manual+August+2019)

### 4. NYISO UG-21 (Transmission Expansion and Interconnection User's Guide)
The User's Guide confirms the Standard Interconnection Procedures (SIP) under Attachment HH apply to:
> **"Generating Facilities that intend to participate in the NYISO wholesale sales"** - with the LFIP (under prior Attachments S, X, Z) applying to facilities **exceeding 20 MW**.

Source: NYISO UG-21, Version 3.0 (Effective 07/18/2025) - [UG-21 PDF](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/3625950/UG-21-TEI+Guide-v2-0-Final.pdf/2c727b38-9b4f-1d29-d967-1736d37aca28?t=1722447395298)

## Summary

| Document | Section | Threshold |
|----------|---------|-----------|
| **NYISO OATT Attachment X** | Title/Scope (Section 30) | **> 20 MW** |
| **NYISO Manual 23** | Section 3.3.1.1 | **> 20 MW** |
| **NYISO UG-21** | Section 6 (SIP Applicability) | **> 20 MW** |

**Note:** Facilities **20 MW or below** typically use the Small Generator Interconnection Procedures (SGIP) under OATT Attachment Z. The 20 MW threshold is the dividing line between "Large Facility" (LFIP) and "Small Generator" (SGIP) interconnection processes in NYISO.

steps.content:
Based on my research of NYISO's official documents, the capacity threshold that triggers the large generation interconnection process in NYISO is **20 MW**.

## Answer

**The capacity threshold is 20 MW.** Generating facilities exceeding 20 MW must use the Large Facility Interconnection Procedures (LFIP) under NYISO's OATT Attachment X.

## Supporting Evidence

### 1. NYISO OATT Attachment X - Standard Large Facility Interconnection Procedures
The tariff explicitly states the applicability threshold in its title and scope:

> **"30 Attachment X – Standard Large Facility Interconnection Procedures (Applicable to Generating Facilities that exceed 20 MWs and to Class Year Transmission Facilities)"**

Source: NYISO OATT Attachment X (Section 30), filed at FERC - [NYISO OATT Section 30 PDF](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/33257202/OATT%2520Section%252030%2520-%2520Full.pdf/ee515fbd-ef9e-0201-014e-beaa42a2c353)

### 2. NYISO Manual 23 (Transmission Expansion and Interconnection Manual) - Section 3.3.1.1
The manual explicitly defines which projects are subject to the LFIP:

> **"3.3.1.1 What projects are subject to the LFIP?"** - The LFIP applies to generating facilities that exceed **20 MW**.

Source: NYISO Manual 23, Version 2.0/2.1 (November 2012/October 2015 Draft) - [Manual 23 Redline PDF](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/1390384/agenda%208%20M-23_TEI%20Manual_Redline.pdf/c21edca4-dc5f-ab73-b6bd-065efb7c680e), Table of Contents showing Section 3.3.1.1

### 3. NYISO Manual 23 (2019 Version) - Table of Contents
The 2019 version of Manual 23 also shows the same structure:
- **Section 3.3: Large Facility Interconnection Procedures (LFIP)**
- **Section 3.3.1: Basic Information about the LFIP**
- **Section 3.3.1.1: What projects are subject to the LFIP?**

Source: NYISO Manual 23, Version 4.0 (Issued 08/02/2019) - [NY DPS Document](https://documents.dps.ny.gov/public/Common/ViewDoc.aspx?DocRefId=%7B80BDC927-CF2E-43E8-8A04-847D26B4E8E7%7D&DocTitle=Hearing+Exhibit+313+Manual+23+Transmission+Expansion+and+Interconnection+Manual+August+2019)

### 4. NYISO UG-21 (Transmission Expansion and Interconnection User's Guide)
The User's Guide confirms the Standard Interconnection Procedures (SIP) under Attachment HH apply to:
> **"Generating Facilities that intend to participate in the NYISO wholesale sales"** - with the LFIP (under prior Attachments S, X, Z) applying to facilities **exceeding 20 MW**.

Source: NYISO UG-21, Version 3.0 (Effective 07/18/2025) - [UG-21 PDF](https://www.nyiso.com/documents/20142/3625950/UG-21-TEI+Guide-v2-0-Final.pdf/2c727b38-9b4f-1d29-d967-1736d37aca28?t=1722447395298)

## Summary

| Document | Section | Threshold |
|----------|---------|-----------|
| **NYISO OATT Attachment X** | Title/Scope (Section 30) | **> 20 MW** |
| **NYISO Manual 23** | Section 3.3.1.1 | **> 20 MW** |
| **NYISO UG-21** | Section 6 (SIP Applicability) | **> 20 MW** |

**Note:** Facilities **20 MW or below** typically use the Small Generator Interconnection Procedures (SGIP) under OATT Attachment Z. The 20 MW threshold is the dividing line between "Large Facility" (LFIP) and "Small Generator" (SGIP) interconnection processes in NYISO.
